sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109003" key="u(poproxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπροχέω</orth>, <sense id="n109003.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pour forth under,</tr_> cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.314.4</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anyt.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
